title: Matrix dimensions
description: Determine the dimensions of a given matrix.
topic_path: Topic C: Lessons 21-23: Transforming vectors with matrices

assessment_items.question_content:
$\left[\begin{array} {ccc}
1 & 6 & 9 & 3 \\
2 & 5 & 8 & 1 \\
0 & 2 & 2 & 4
\end{array}\right]$

**What are the dimensions of the matrix?**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\times$ [[☃ numeric-input 2]]
hints:
The first dimension is the number of **rows** in the matrix.

There are $3$ rows.

The second dimension is the number of **columns** in the matrix.

There are $4$ columns.
**In conclusion, the dimensions of the matrix are $3\times 4$.**
